name: makerchip-workspace
description: VS Code extension for Makerchip IDE integration

makerchip.autoUpdateResources.description: Automatically update Makerchip resources on activation

enumDescriptions: Ask whether to add resources folder to workspace
Always add resources folder to workspace
Never add resources folder to workspace
makerchip.addResourcesFolder.description: Add Makerchip resources folder to workspace (for LLMs)

languageModelTools.name: makerchip_run
languageModelTools.userDescription: Compile and open TL-Verilog in Makerchip IDE.
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Opens the Makerchip IDE in VS Code and compiles the current or specified TL-Verilog file. Use this when the user wants to run, compile, open, or launch Makerchip. The tool will open a webview panel beside the editor showing the compiled circuit diagram, waveforms, and Visual Debug output.

filePath.description: Optional path to a TL-Verilog file to open and compile. If not provided, uses the currently active editor.

chatParticipants.name: makerchip
chatParticipants.description: Makerchip IDE integration for TL-Verilog development

scripts.pretest: npm run compile && npm run lint
